{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Rising Earth sect
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rising Earth sect]] was wiped out.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]]'s people destroyed the [[Rising Earth sect]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Oh, you wiped out the Rising Earth sect?” Fury’s tone was light, even conversational.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
